info.name: Atom Identity & Authorization
info.description:
Human-oriented smoke and workflow tests for Atom.

Prerequisites:
1. Start Postgres and Atom.
2. Boot Atom once with ADMIN_SECRET matching the collection variable `admin_secret`.
3. Default URL is `http://localhost:8080`.

Run folders in order. The collection stores tokens and IDs as collection variables.

exec: const cap = caps.find(c => c.name === name && c.resource_kind === null);
